source_findings.raw_text: Human vs LLM prose naturalness ranking tasks using parallel prompts with concreteness and texture discriminators.

proposals.description: Propose an enforcement concept for concreteness and abstraction bounds.
proposals.rationale: Research findings repeatedly indicate that these behaviors fail when left as soft prompting and require explicit governed constraints.
proposals.expected_impact: Defines candidate hard-boundary controls that can later feed runtime enforcement design and report generation.
risks: over-enforcement can flatten style
soft literary effects may be misclassified
thresholds remain unresolved in this pass

conflicts.raw_text: Configure evaluators (LLM-judges, discriminators, metrics) to run with greedy decoding and fixed seeds to ensure deterministic behavior.

source_findings.raw_text: Multi-speaker scenes with permuted speaker identities to detect dialogue homogenization.
Dialogue must exhibit non-uniform turn lengths and controlled overlap or interruption patterns.
Character disfluency rates must match trait- and tension-specific ranges.
Sample dialogue turn lengths from character-specific asymmetric distributions and inject bounded overlap markers under tension.
Apply disfluency policies by character archetype and tension level.
Dialogue theater-script stiffness with no overlap or interruption.
Dialogue over-noise or under-noise relative to character profile.

conflicts.raw_text: Periodically re-calibrate automated evaluators against human rubric benchmarks for both narrative and dialogue.

source_findings.raw_text: Cadence-only classification tasks distinguishing human vs LLM paragraphs using structural features.
Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
Sentence-length variance must stay above the configured lower bound for the active cadence profile.
Clause-depth runs must be bounded; the system may not emit too many consecutive high-depth or low-depth sentences.
Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
Maintain a rolling paragraph buffer for sentence lengths and trigger burst modulation when medium-length clustering persists.
Parse clause depth per sentence and inject compensating low-depth or high-depth sentences when run limits are exceeded.
Update a narrative-pressure scalar through each scene and bind cadence decisions to that scalar.

source_findings.raw_text: Long narratives with removed climaxes to test narrative progression and payoff detection.
Narrative pressure must evolve within configured slope bounds and may not flatten unintentionally inside pressure-building scenes.
Character disfluency rates must match trait- and tension-specific ranges.
Update a narrative-pressure scalar through each scene and bind cadence decisions to that scalar.
Sample dialogue turn lengths from character-specific asymmetric distributions and inject bounded overlap markers under tension.
Apply disfluency policies by character archetype and tension level.
Replay scenes with flat, rising, and whiplash pressure curves and verify pressure-slope validation behavior.

source_findings.raw_text: Documents with injected contradictions to test continuity and canon enforcement.
State transitions must be logged as explicit diffs and may not retroactively rewrite canonical state without governance.
Seed contradictory entity updates into continuity state and verify state-diff and coherence checks block illegal transitions.

source_findings.raw_text: Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
Monitor style consistency dashboards to detect unexpected voice drift across releases.
For editing pipelines, measure voice preservation and semantic fidelity before enabling new editors in production.
Voice preservation after editing – measure voice_preservation_after_edit_v1 and semantic fidelity on edited_pairs_voice_labelled_v1; compare to human labels.
Editing passes may not reduce entropy and idiosyncrasy below the configured preservation floor.
Style-preservation edits must restore voice markers when cleanup operations over-normalize prose.
Load per-character idiosyncrasy profiles and enforce bounded reuse of signature discourse markers or phrase fossils.
After each edit pass, compare entropy and idiosyncrasy against the pre-edit reference and restore voice markers when needed.
Idiosyncrasy absence leading to generic voice.
Produce dialogue for multiple characters with and without signature markers and verify idiosyncrasy-range checks.
Run edit passes that normalize voice and verify post-edit entropy/idiosyncrasy preservation checks catch degradation.

source_findings.raw_text: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
Configure evaluators (LLM-judges, discriminators, metrics) to run with greedy decoding and fixed seeds to ensure deterministic behavior.
For editing pipelines, measure voice preservation and semantic fidelity before enabling new editors in production.
All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.
System changes must pass sandbox evaluation before shadow evaluation.
No change may be promoted to production without benchmark replay against the relevant fixture set.
AI-generated reflections or rule proposals may never directly modify production rules.
Systemic-versus-one-off failure classification must use deterministic clustering or deterministic feature analytics in primary workflows.
Style fingerprints must be versioned and frozen between releases unless changed through governance.
Production runtime style enforcement must be rule-based or use frozen numeric thresholds from hybrid evaluators.
State transitions must be logged as explicit diffs and may not retroactively rewrite canonical state without governance.
Reflexion-style self-reflection may run only in sandboxed improvement loops, never as a live production writer or updater.
Generate `system_change_proposal` artifacts for every candidate update and route them through sandbox then shadow evaluation.
Load continuity state snapshots before generation or refinement and emit deterministic `state_diff` artifacts after each segment.
Use rule-based checks in production runtime; confine LLM-as-judge and Reflexion-style loops to sandbox analysis unless explicitly frozen and approved.
Governance capture where proposal and approval paths are not sufficiently separated.
